_publications._publicationTitle: Unbalancing cAMP and Ras/MAPK pathways as a therapeutic strategy for cutaneous neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: we selected genes constituting the signature and performed an enrichment analysis. We selected two groups of biological processes: (a) those related to immune response, immune cell migration, and chemotaxis
details: Successfully performed enrichment analysis of SC-FB crosstalk signature genes, identifying biological processes related to immune response, immune cell migration, chemotaxis, and developmental signaling pathways
